scripts.build: npm run build --workspace kazakh-script-converter && npm run build --workspace kazakh-script-converter-lm
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace kazakh-script-converter && npm run test --workspace kazakh-script-converter-lm
scripts.pack:dry: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --cache .npm-cache --workspace kazakh-script-converter && npm pack --dry-run --cache .npm-cache --workspace kazakh-script-converter-lm
